staffing.caveat: ceiling is router-estimated; slope not level is informative

erlang.read: ≈1 = fortuna ceiling consistent with Erlang loss; >1 = ceiling conservative

latency_curve.read: >0 = congestion regime; ≈0 = capacity slack (latency set by model size, not load)

hawkes.read: counting estimate (upper bound; double-counts chains); ratio→1 = self-sustaining cascade regime. Exponential-kernel MLE gates at 100 events.
